title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!
